Consumption"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to large memory usage, as `MAX_DECLARED_STREAM_LENGTH` is sometimes ignored. This requires parsing a content stream without a `/Length` value.

### Patches
This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.13.3](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.13.3).

### Workarounds
If you cannot upgrade yet, consider applying the changes from PR [#3871](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3871).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jm82-fx9c-mx94", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-18T14:28:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jm82-fx9c-mx94", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jm82-fx9c-mx94"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-18T14:28:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-jm82-fx9c-mx94", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3871", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.13.3", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jm82-fx9c-mx94"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-jm82-fx9c-mx94", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf: Missing stream length values ignore defined limits", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-18T14:28:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jm82-fx9c-mx94", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.13.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.13.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf: Missing stream length values ignore defined limits
